title: SKILL_NODE_V1
description: Single node in the Skill Evolution Graph. Records the admission or rejection of a skill version: what it originated from, what decision it received, and where it sits in the skill family tree.

skill_version.description: Semantic version of this skill node.

parent_skill_id.description: Parent skill. Null for root skill (newly discovered capability).

parent_version.description: Parent skill version. Null for root.

origin_experiments.description: Experiment IDs that motivated this skill version proposal.

promotion_case_hash.description: SHA-256 of the AUTORESEARCH_PROMOTION_CASE_V1 that produced this node.

reducer_decision.description: Reducer verdict on the promotion case.
